requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamps - IS 16102 under BIS CRS
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯——BIS CRS 下的 IS 16102
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈——BIS CRS 下的 IS 16102

summary.en: For notified self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting service, BIS CRS registration requires testing against the specified IS 16102 requirements. The scope typically addresses safety and performance characteristics for LED lamps with integrated control gear. For notified LED lamp products, conformity to the specified Indian Standard is a compulsory part of the CRS market-access route.
summary.zh: 对于被通知的普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯，BIS CRS 注册要求依据指定的 IS 16102 要求进行测试。范围通常涉及带集成控制装置 LED 灯的安全和性能特性。对于被通知的 LED 灯产品，符合指定印度标准是 CRS 市场准入路径的强制组成部分。
summary.zht: 對於被通知的普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈，BIS CRS 註冊要求依據指定的 IS 16102 要求進行測試。範圍通常涉及帶集成控制裝置 LED 燈的安全和性能特性。對於被通知的 LED 燈產品，符合指定印度標準是 CRS 市場准入路徑的強制組成部分。

standards_or_laws: Electronics and Information Technology Goods CRS notifications for notified LED lamps
IS 16102 series - Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services

summary.en: China commonly uses GB standards for self-ballasted LED lamps, LED module safety, and lamp performance, together with CCC or other China-market controls where applicable. The China file may contain useful CB, IEC, GB, or CCC data, but India still requires the correct BIS CRS applicant, factory, brand, model grouping, and Standard Mark authorization for in-scope goods.
summary.zh: 中国通常对自镇流 LED 灯、LED 模块安全和灯性能采用 GB 标准，并在适用时结合 CCC 或其他中国市场控制。中国文件可能包含有用的 CB、IEC、GB 或 CCC 数据，但印度适用产品仍需正确的 BIS CRS 申请人、工厂、品牌、型号分组及标准标志授权。
summary.zht: 中國通常對自鎮流 LED 燈、LED 模組安全和燈性能採用 GB 標準，並在適用時結合 CCC 或其他中國市場控制。中國文件可能包含有用的 CB、IEC、GB 或 CCC 數據，但印度適用產品仍需正確的 BIS CRS 申請人、工廠、品牌、型號分組及標準標誌授權。

standards_or_laws: Applicable GB standards for self-ballasted LED lamps
China CCC or related lighting product controls where applicable

gap.en: India distinguishes between a luminaire and a lamp entry. A replaceable LED lamp inside a luminaire may need its own CRS status, while the luminaire may be checked separately if notified. Manufacturers should avoid assuming one registration covers the whole product bundle unless BIS scope guidance confirms it.
gap.zh: 印度区分灯具条目与灯条目。灯具内的可更换 LED 灯可能需要自身 CRS 状态，而灯具若被通知也可能需单独核查。制造商不应假设一个注册覆盖整个产品组合，除非 BIS 适用范围指引确认。
gap.zht: 印度區分燈具條目與燈條目。燈具內的可更換 LED 燈可能需要自身 CRS 狀態，而燈具若被通知也可能需單獨核查。製造商不應假設一個註冊覆蓋整個產品組合，除非 BIS 適用範圍指引確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for notified self-ballasted LED lamps under the applicable BIS CRS law, order, or notification; testing against the specified IS 16102 requirements is compulsory for in-scope notified products.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only where Chinese law covers the China-market lamp; China certificates do not replace BIS CRS registration.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For notified self-ballasted LED lamps, prepare a separate BIS CRS scope check and mandatory IS 16102 test evidence. The CRS notification creates the legal mandate, and testing to the specified IS is required for in-scope notified products.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】对于被通知的自镇流 LED 灯，应单独进行 BIS CRS 适用范围核查并准备强制性 IS 16102 测试证据。CRS 通知产生法律强制要求，适用的被通知产品必须按指定 IS 进行测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】對於被通知的自鎮流 LED 燈，應單獨進行 BIS CRS 適用範圍核查並準備強制性 IS 16102 測試證據。CRS 通知產生法律強制要求，適用的被通知產品必須按指定 IS 進行測試。
